name: OpenJam
description: Capture console, network, screenshots, mic narration and device info into one self-contained bug report. Open-source Jam.dev.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' data: *; img-src * data: blob:; media-src * data: blob:; font-src * data:; frame-src 'self' data: blob:; child-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'none'
